Welcome

These pages are designed to give you as much information as possible about the work I do as your MP, and the Rawmarsh & Conisbrough constituency I serve.

If you have a problem, I am always ready to listen and do what I can to help. So if there is something you would like to discuss please get in touch.

You can contact me with problems or concerns connected with Parliamentary or central Government matters. This could be issues linked to government departments, like the Department of Health, tax or benefit problems or queries or concerns about government policy or legislation.

I may be able to help with your problem or find out information for you by contacting a Government minister on your behalf.

2026-04-30T10:30:49+01:0023rd April 2026|

John Healey, MP for Rawmarsh and Conisbrough, has today welcomed the news that Dearne Valley College and Rotherham College, part of RNN Group is to be awarded Technical Excellence College status for its [...]

Advice surgeries

I hold regular advice surgeries around the borough.
If you would like to make an appointment please call
01709 875943 or you can email me directly on
john.healey.mp@parliament.uk
